task.title: [DOTFILES] Sistema de dotfiles integrado ao bootstrap

todos.description: Create configs/ subdirectories (git/, neovim/, starship/, alacritty/, tmux/) with stub dotfiles (examples/commented defaults)
todos.note: Created config stubs for git, neovim, starship, alacritty, and tmux with commented defaults.

todos.description: Add Dotfiles section to internal/config/config.go — extend Config struct with Dotfiles field (URLs, enabled list) and validation logic
todos.note: Added DotfilesConfig struct with Source/Apply fields and URL validation.

todos.description: Update agnostic.yaml.example — add dotfiles section with commented examples for local and remote dotfiles
todos.note: Added dotfiles section to agnostic.yaml.example with commented examples.

todos.description: Implement internal/dotfiles/manager.go — DotfilesManager with Apply (XDG-aware symlinks, --force guard), List, Diff, and external git clone support
todos.note: Implemented Manager with Apply (XDG symlinks, force/backup), List, Diff, and external git clone.

todos.description: Write internal/dotfiles/manager_test.go — table-driven unit tests for Apply, List, Diff, and force/conflict scenarios
todos.note: Wrote table-driven tests for Apply (symlinks, backup, force), List, Diff (missing, changed), and missing source handling.

todos.description: Create cmd/agnostic/dotfiles.go — CLI subcommand 'agnostic dotfiles' with apply (--from, --force), list, and diff subcommands
todos.note: Created cmd/agnostic/dotfiles.go with apply (--from, --force), list, and diff subcommands.

todos.description: Integrate dotfiles into bootstrap flow — call DotfilesManager.Apply at the end of BootstrapAll in internal/bootstrap/rootfs.go
todos.note: Added Step 11 in BootstrapAll that applies dotfiles to rootfs home when DotfilesApply is true.

todos.description: Verify go build ./..., go vet ./..., go test ./... -race all pass
todos.note: All checks passed: go build ./..., go vet ./..., go test ./... -race all green.
